articles.author: Justina Lee, Lee Ying Shan
articles.title: South Korea stocks lead gains in Asia as oil prices plunge after U.S.-Iran ceasefire deal - CNBC
articles.description: Asia-Pacific markets opened higher after President Donald Trump said he agreed to suspend planned attacks on Iranian infrastructure for two weeks.
articles.content:
Asia-Pacific markets rallied on Wednesday after U.S. President Donald Trump said he had agreed to suspend planned attacks on Iranian infrastructure for two weeks.
The move was "subject to the Islami… [+2018 chars]
